scores.notes: The response describes the code but does not include the actual code — no src/charm.py or charmcraft.yaml is shown, only a prose description of what each would contain. Per scoring rules, complete=1 since structure is described but code is absent. Idiomatic=1 because the description uses install+config_changed event pattern rather than the modern CollectStatusEvent/collect_unit_status pattern noted as best practice in the gold standard. All described APIs (WaitingStatus, ActiveStatus, install, config_changed) are real, so no hallucinations.
